title: Stacks vs Queues: The Epic Showdown!
topic: What is a stack vs queue

dialogue.line: Stewie, what's the difference between a stack and a queue?
Ah, Peter, think of a stack as a pancake tower!
You can only take the top pancake, no cheating!
A queue is like a line at the DMV. First in, first out!
Technically, a stack uses LIFO: Last In, First Out.
A queue uses FIFO: First In, First Out. Simple, yes?
So, a stack's like my fridge. Stuff in the back gets real old!
Exactly, and a queue's orderly like... well, not you!
I see! Use stacks in apps like undo buttons!
Yes, and queues for task scheduling, unless it’s your workout schedule!
Great! Can I stack my burgers that way?
Only if you want them to disappear faster!
